name: triggered
description: Donald Trump Jr.'s 'Triggered: How the Left Thrives on Hate and Wants to Silence Us' — a political manifesto arguing that cancel culture, media bias, and the 'woke left' seek to silence conservative voices.
useCase: Understand conservative critiques of cancel culture, media bias, campus indoctrination, and the weaponization of political correctness.
knownRisks: Strongly partisan — presents one side of a deeply contested cultural divide
Written by a political activist, not a neutral observer
Contains provocative language that may offend
